items.title: Former captain Knight announces England retirement
items.summary: Heather Knight will retire from international cricket after the Rothesay Test match between England and India at Lord's this week.

items.title: Spain beat Germany to win U19 Euros in Wrexham
items.summary: Spain claim the Uefa Men's Under-19 Championship for the 10th time with a 2-0 victory over Germany at Wrexham's Racecourse Ground.
